2026-06-30JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Court of Appeal for Ontario and a Judge ex officio of the Superior Court of Justice of OntarioAppointment of the Honourable Lisa Brownstone, a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a Judge of the Court of Appeal for Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Court of Appeal for Ontario and a Judge ex officio of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Lisa Brownstone, a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a Judge of the Court of Appeal for Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario.
